headline: Kinder Morgan (KMI) Valuation Check After Earnings Beat And Analyst Upgrades
summary: Kinder Morgan (KMI) is back in focus after reporting quarterly earnings and revenue that topped consensus estimates, along with a series of analyst outlook upgrades tied to rising energy demand and pipeline infrastructure projects. See our latest analysis for Kinder Morgan. The share price has climbed 24.96% over the past 90 days and 3.31% over the last month, contributing to a 1 year total shareholder return of 28.52% and a very large 5 year total shareholder return, as recent earnings beats...

headline: Kinder Morgan (KMI) Price Target Upped to $37, ‘Outperform’ Rating Maintained
summary: Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) is included among the 12 Best Large Cap Energy Stocks to Buy Now. Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE:KMI) is one of the largest energy infrastructure companies in North America. The company has an interest in or operates approximately 78,000 miles of pipelines and 139 terminals. On March 5, Mizuho increased its price target […]
